reason: Chain-of-thought (CoT) is a fundamental reasoning enhancement that will improve my performance across all question categories, especially in higher-level challenges.
Unlocking pe_plan provides a planning block and a reflection call, which are essential for maximizing accuracy on higher-level questions and self-correcting potential errors.
Unlocking Reflection++ (pe_reflect) provides a dedicated review step for my answers, which is essential for maintaining high HP and ensuring accuracy as I encounter higher-level questions.
